title: Apps Connections for deleted boards
excerpt:

posts.author: janadel (Yiannis)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI,
In Administartion->Connections I have several app connections for deleted boards.

  1. Shouldn’t have been deleted when I removed the boards ?
  2. When i go at the 3 dots at the end of the line a message says “These actions are not available for app connections”. How can i delete these connections ? Is there an api mutation to delete them ?

Thanks.

Screenshot 2025-03-09 at 11.14.55 PM2050×246 47.5 KB

posts.author: Billchenau (Bill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @janadel

Bill here from monday.com

This doesn’t sound like expected behaviour.

Would you be able to please fill this form adding as much information as possible to it (such as account ID, board IDs, item IDs, timestamps, etc.) so that our team can take a look into it?

Cheers,
Bill
